How It Works

Get a verified maid in just 3 simple steps

1

Search & Shortlist

Select your city, area and service type. Browse verified profiles matching your exact needs.

2

Unlock & Connect

Subscribe to a plan, unlock the maid's contact number, and connect directly — no middleman, no delay.

3

Interview & Finalise

Meet the maid yourself, ask questions, and decide on your own terms — salary, timing, and duties are all agreed directly between you.

Simple, Honest Pricing

Ek plan kharido, verified maids se turant contact karo. Koi hidden charge nahi.

1. Plan Kharido
Apni zaroorat ke hisaab se plan chuno
→
2. Maid Dhundo
State, city, service se filter karo
→
3. Request Bhejo
Maid ko request bhejo plan credits se
→
4. Number Milega
Maid accept kare toh number unlock

Yeh fees kya hain?

Yeh fees maid ka salary nahi hai — yeh sirf platform fee hai jisse aap verified maids ke numbers unlock kar sakte ho. Salary aur kaam ki baatein aap seedha maid se karoge. Koi hidden charge nahi.

Rent a Maid India ke Baare Mein

India ka sabse aasaan platform — ghar ki maid dhundo aur seedha contact karo.

🏠

Humara Mission

Rent a Maid India ek connection platform hai — hum ghar ke kaam ke liye maaids aur customers ko ek doosre se milate hain. Maid register karti hai, customer plan khareedta hai, request bhejta hai, number milta hai, phir dono apas mein baat karke sab decide karte hain.

Hum Kaise Kaam Karte Hain?

Maid Registration

Koi bhi maid/helper humare platform par register kar sakti hai. Unka profile, photo, services, location — sab dikhta hai customers ko.

Customer Search

Customer apne state, city, area aur service type se maids filter karta hai aur profiles dekhta hai. Jo pasand aaye use request bhejta hai.

Direct Contact

Maid accept kare toh dono ke numbers unlock ho jaate hain. Phir salary, timing, kaam — sab kuch seedha baat karke decide hota hai. Hum beech mein nahi aate.

Admin Verification

Humare admin team har maid ko review karke verify karte hain taaki customers ko sirf trusted aur genuine profiles milein.

Humari kuch zaroori baatein

  • ✓ Hum sirf maid aur customer ko connect karte hain — koi agency ya employer nahi hain.
  • ✓ Salary negotiate aap seedha maid se karte ho — humaari koi involvement nahi.
  • ✓ Plan fee sirf contact unlock karne ke liye hai, kisi aur cheez ke liye nahi.
  • ✓ Maid ko apna number share karna ya na karna — yeh maid ki marzi hai (Accept/Decline).
  

Aksar Pooche Jaane Wale Sawaal

Hamare platform ke baare mein sab kuch — customers aur maids dono ke liye.

Customers ke liye

Bahut simple hai! Pehle aap ek plan kharido → phir apni city/area ke hisaab se maid search karo → pasand ki maid ko request bhejo → maid accept kare toh uska phone number aapke profile mein unlock ho jaata hai → phir aap seedha call/WhatsApp karke sab kuch discuss karo.
Plan khareedne ke baad aapko ek fixed number of "requests" milti hain (plan ke hisaab se). Har request mein aap ek maid ka number unlock kar sakte ho. Jitne requests utne maids se contact kar sakte ho.
Jaise hi aap request bhejoge, maid ko notification milegi. Maid jab aapki request Accept karegi, turant aapke dashboard mein uska phone number dikhega. Agar maid Decline kare toh aap doosri maid ko try kar sakte ho — request credit wapas nahi aata.
Salary, timing, kaam ki jagah, live-in/live-out — yeh sab aap aur maid apas mein seedha baat karke decide karoge. Hum sirf contact karaate hain, beech mein nahi aate. Hamari responsibility sirf contact connect karna hai.
Koi baat nahi — aap apne remaining request credits se doosri maid ko request bhej sakte ho. Agar plan mein requests khatam ho gayi toh nayi plan le sakte ho ya upgrade kar sakte ho.
Haan — humare admin team har maid ki profile review karke verify karte hain register karne ke baad. Verified maids ke profile par ✓ badge dikhta hai. Hum encourage karte hain ki contact karne ke baad aap khud bhi Aadhar card check karo.

Maids / Helpers ke liye

"Register as Maid" button par click karo → apna naam, phone number, city, services, experience bharo → submit karo. Admin verify karega aur aapka profile live ho jaayega. Bilkul free hai!
Bilkul nahi! Maid ke liye registration aur platform use karna 100% free hai. Sirf customers plan khareedte hain. Aapko koi paisa nahi dena.
Apne Dashboard → "Requests Received" mein request dikhegi. Customer ka naam, city, contact — sab dikhega. Aap Accept ya Decline kar sakte ho. Accept karne par customer aapka number unlock kar sakta hai aur aapko bhi customer ka number milega.
Haan, bilkul! Salary, timing, kaam — sab kuch aap seedha customer se negotiate karogi. Platform ke baad jo bhi decision hoga woh aap dono ke beech hoga. Hum sirf contact karaate hain.

Tips, Guides & City Maid Guides

India ke 75+ cities ke liye maid, cook, cleaning aur babysitter guides. Apna shahar aur service dhundho.

🔍
Customer GuideJun 2026

Sahi Maid Kaise Dhunden? Step-by-Step Guide

State → City → Area → Service Type filter karo, profiles dekho, aur sahi maid ko request bhejo. Yeh guide aapka pehla step easy banayegi.

Steps:
1️⃣ Login karein ya account banayein
2️⃣ Plan khareedein (Basic se shuru karein)
3️⃣ "Find Maids" mein apni city aur service select karein
4️⃣ Profile dekho → "Book Now" par click karo
5️⃣ Maid accept kare → number milega → call karo!
📞
Customer TipsJun 2026

Maid Se Pehli Baar Baat Kaise Karein?

Number milne ke baad kya poochein? Salary, timing, kaam — in sab cheezoin ke baare mein smartly negotiate karne ke tips.

Zaroor poochein:
✅ Roz ka schedule aur availability
✅ Kaunse kaam kar sakti hain (cooking, cleaning, etc.)
✅ Expected salary per month
✅ Live-in chahiye ya sirf kuch ghante
✅ Aadhar card verification
📋
Maid GuideJun 2026

Maid Register Karne Ke Fayde — Apna Profile Banao

Ghar baithe kaam dhundo! Rent a Maid India par register karo, apna profile banao aur customers seedha aapse contact karenge.

Register karne ke fayde:
🆓 Bilkul free — koi fee nahi
📍 Apni city/area mein customers dhundo
📱 Accept/Decline karna aapke haath
💰 Salary aap decide karo
✓ Admin verification se trust milega
💡
How It WorksJun 2026

Rent a Maid India Ka Poora System Samjho

Yeh platform kisi agency ki tarah nahi hai — hum sirf connect karaate hain. Ek baar samjho aur confidently use karo.

Platform kya karta hai:
🔗 Maid aur Customer ko connect karna
🔓 Plan se phone number unlock karna
✅ Admin se maid profiles verify karna
Platform kya nahi karta:
❌ Salary decide nahi karta
❌ Kaam ki guarantee nahi deta
💰
Pricing GuideJun 2026

Maid Salary India 2026 — City-Wise Rate List

Delhi, Mumbai, Bangalore, Kota, Jaipur aur sab cities mein maid, cook, babysitter aur cleaning maid ka monthly salary kitna hota hai?

Part-Time Maid: ₹3,000–₹6,000/month
Full-Time Maid: ₹8,000–₹14,000/month
Live-In Maid: ₹10,000–₹20,000/month
Cook Maid: ₹5,000–₹14,000/month
Babysitter: ₹8,000–₹15,000/month
🛡️
Safety TipsJun 2026

Maid Hire Karte Waqt Dhyan Dene Wali Baatein

Ghar mein kisi nayi insaan ko kaam par rakhna ek bada decision hai. Yeh safety tips zaroor padho.

🪪 Aadhar card photo zaroor lo
📝 Chhoti si written agreement banao
👥 1-2 din trial pe rakhne ke baad pakka karo
🔐 Ghar ki chabi ek din mein mat dena
📞 Local references zaroor maango
🏠
Maid Service GuideKota, Rajasthan

Maid in Kota: Hire Verified Domestic Helper in Kota, Rajasthan

Kya aap Kota mein maid dhundh rahe hain? Rent a Maid India — India ka #1 verified maid platform — aapko Kota, Rajasthan mein background-checked, Aadhaar-verified maids se direct connect karta hai. Part-time maid, full-time maid ya live-in maid — sabhi options available hain sirf Kota mein.

  • ✓Part-Time Maid Kota — ₹3,000–₹6,000/month — roz 2-4 ghante ke liye
  • ✓Full-Time Maid Kota — ₹8,000–₹14,000/month — 8+ ghante daily
  • ✓Live-In Maid Kota — ₹10,000–₹20,000/month — 24/7 ghar mein rehti hai
  • ✓Cleaning + Cooking Maid Kota — sabhi kaam ek hi maid se
  • ✓Aadhaar Verified & Background Checked — Kota ki trusted maids

❓ Kota mein maid ka kiraya kitna hota hai?

Kota mein part-time maid (2-4 hrs) ka cost ₹3,000 se ₹6,000 per month hota hai. Full-time maid ₹8,000–₹14,000 aur live-in maid ₹10,000–₹20,000 per month milti hai. Rent a Maid India pe Kota ki verified maids competitive rates pe available hain.

❓ Kota mein maid kaise dhunden?

Rent a Maid India pe Kota select karein, service type chunein (cleaning/cooking/babysitter), verified profiles browse karein aur directly call/WhatsApp karein. Poori process 5 minute mein hoti hai. Kota mein 24-48 ghante mein maid available ho jaati hai.

Find Maid in Kota →

Cook Maid GuideKota, Rajasthan

Cook Maid in Kota: Hire Personal Cook & Kitchen Helper in Kota

Kota mein cook maid ya kitchen helper hire karna chahte hain? Rent a Maid India pe Kota, Rajasthan ke best verified cooks milenge jo North Indian, South Indian aur regional khana banana jaante hain. Breakfast se lekar dinner tak — ghar ka saara khaana perfect ho jaata hai.

  • ✓Part-Time Cook Kota — Sirf khana banana — ₹5,000–₹8,000/month
  • ✓Full-Time Cook Kota — Teen time ka khana — ₹8,000–₹14,000/month
  • ✓Kitchen Helper Kota — Cutting, cleaning, sabzi — ₹3,500–₹6,000/month
  • ✓Tiffin Cook Kota — Dabba/tiffin banane ke liye
  • ✓Personal Chef Kota — Special occasions ke liye bhi available

❓ Kota mein cook maid ka salary kitna hota hai?

Kota mein part-time cook (sirf khana banana, 2-3 ghante) ka salary ₹5,000–₹8,000/month hota hai. Full-time cook (teen time ka khana) ₹8,000–₹14,000 per month milta hai. Kitchen helper ₹3,500–₹6,000/month mein milta hai.

❓ Kota mein personal cook kaise hire karein?

Rent a Maid India pe Kota select karein, 'Cook' service chunein, verified cook profiles dekho. Sabke paas experience details, cuisine specialty aur ratings hain. Directly call karein aur taste test ke liye ek din trial rakhein. Kota mein 24-48 ghante mein cook available ho jaata hai.

Cleaning Maid GuideKota, Rajasthan

Cleaning Maid in Kota: Hire Safai Wali Bai in Kota, Rajasthan

Kota mein cleaning maid ya safai wali bai hire karna chahte hain? Rent a Maid India pe Kota ki verified cleaning helpers milti hain jo ghar ki safai — jhadu, pocha, dusting, bathroom cleaning, kitchen cleaning — sab perfect tarike se karti hain. Daily cleaning ya weekly deep cleaning — dono available.

  • ✓Daily Cleaning Maid Kota — Jhadu + Pocha + Dusting — ₹3,000–₹5,500/month
  • ✓Deep Cleaning Service Kota — Weekly ya monthly full home clean
  • ✓Kitchen Cleaning Maid Kota — Kitchen + Utensils safai specialist
  • ✓Bathroom Cleaning Kota — Daily bathroom + toilet cleaning
  • ✓Office/Apartment Cleaning Kota — Commercial spaces ke liye bhi available

❓ Kota mein cleaning maid ka rate kya hai?

Kota mein part-time cleaning maid (2-3 ghante roz — jhadu, pocha, dusting) ka rate ₹3,000–₹5,500 per month hota hai. Deep cleaning service weekly ₹800–₹1,500 per visit hoti hai. Kitchen ya bathroom specialist cleaning maid thodi mehgi hoti hai.

❓ Kota mein safai wali bai kaise dhunden?

Rent a Maid India pe Kota select karein, 'Cleaning' service type chunein aur verified safai wali profiles dekho. Saari cleaning maids Aadhaar verified hain aur Kota ke local areas ke hisaab se available hain. Booking 5 minute mein ho jaati hai.

Babysitter GuideKota, Rajasthan

Babysitter in Kota: Hire Trusted Nanny & Child Care Helper in Kota

Kota mein babysitter ya nanny hire karna chahte hain? Rent a Maid India pe Kota, Rajasthan ki verified babysitters aur nannies milti hain jo aapke bachche ki dekhbhal karne mein expert hain. Infant care se lekar school-age children tak — trained aur trusted childcare helpers available hain Kota mein.

  • ✓Babysitter Kota — 0-12 saal ke bachche ki dekhbhal — ₹8,000–₹15,000/month
  • ✓Infant Care Maid Kota — Naye janme bachche ki care specialist
  • ✓Japa Maid Kota — Nayi maa aur newborn ke liye post-delivery care
  • ✓School Pickup Helper Kota — School se pick karna + homework help
  • ✓Full-Time Nanny Kota — 8+ ghante daily childcare

❓ Kota mein babysitter ka salary kitna hota hai?

Kota mein babysitter/nanny ka salary ₹8,000–₹15,000 per month hota hai, depending on experience and hours. Infant care specialist thoda mehenga hota hai — ₹10,000–₹18,000/month. Japa maid (newborn + maa ki care) ₹10,000–₹16,000 per month milti hai Kota mein.

❓ Kota mein trusted babysitter ya nanny kaise dhunden?

Rent a Maid India pe Kota select karein, 'Babysitter' ya 'Child Care' select karein. Har profile mein experience, age group specialty aur ratings diya hota hai. Directly call karein aur ek din trial rakho apne ghar pe. Kota ki saari babysitters Aadhaar verified hain.

❓ Guwahati mein babysitter ka salary kitna hota hai?

Guwahati mein babysitter/nanny ka salary ₹8,000–₹15,000 per month hota hai, depending on experience and hours. Infant care specialist thoda mehenga hota hai — ₹10,000–₹18,000/month. Japa maid (newborn + maa ki care) ₹10,000–₹16,000 per month milti hai Guwahati mein.

❓ Guwahati mein trusted babysitter ya nanny kaise dhunden?

Rent a Maid India pe Guwahati select karein, 'Babysitter' ya 'Child Care' select karein. Har profile mein experience, age group specialty aur ratings diya hota hai. Directly call karein aur ek din trial rakho apne ghar pe. Guwahati ki saari babysitters Aadhaar verified hain.

Find Babysitter in Guwahati →

Terms & Conditions

Please read and accept all declarations below before submitting your application.

Health & Background Declarations

Platform Terms & Conditions

1. Nature of the Platform — Connector Only

Rent a Maid India is strictly a listing, advertising, and connection platform. We help Customers and Maids/Helpers discover each other and share contact numbers after a Customer subscribes to a paid plan. We are NOT an employer, recruitment agency, staffing agency, labour contractor, or placement service. We do not employ, supervise, manage, train, schedule, or control any Maid/Helper. All hiring decisions, work terms, salary, schedule, conduct, and outcomes are decided entirely and exclusively between the Customer and the Maid/Helper themselves.

2. Verification — What We Do and Do NOT Do

2.1 Our verification process is limited to checking the profile photograph against the photograph and details on the government-issued Aadhar card submitted at registration. This is an identity check only.

2.2 We do NOT conduct police verification, criminal background checks, character checks, medical checks, psychological screening, or any background investigation of any kind on any Maid/Helper or Customer, regardless of any badge or label displayed on the Platform such as "Verified."

2.3 We make no representation, warranty, or guarantee — express or implied — regarding the character, trustworthiness, honesty, criminal history, health, conduct, competence, skill, or suitability of any Maid/Helper or Customer. A "Verified" badge confirms only that an Aadhar-linked document was submitted and visually matched; it is not a certificate of good character or safety.

2.4 It is the sole responsibility of the Customer to independently verify the Maid/Helper before engaging them, including obtaining police verification at their own cost. It is equally the sole responsibility of the Maid/Helper to independently verify the Customer and the work premises before accepting any engagement. Proceeding without such verification is a voluntary decision made at the User's own risk.

3. No Liability for Conduct of Users

3.1 The Platform shall not be held responsible or liable, in any manner whatsoever, for any act, omission, conduct, behaviour, dispute, dishonesty, negligence, criminal act, or default committed by any Customer or Maid/Helper, whether during or after any work engagement.

3.2 Without limiting the above, the Platform bears no responsibility or liability for: theft, loss, or damage of money, property, or valuables; non-payment or delayed payment of wages; any form of harassment, abuse, assault, or misconduct; breach of trust, fraud, or misrepresentation; any injury, accident, illness, or death at the place of work; any civil or criminal dispute, FIR, or court case arising between a Customer and a Maid/Helper; or any loss arising from the Maid/Helper's conduct, skill, attendance, or reliability.

3.3 Any dispute between a Customer and a Maid/Helper is strictly a private matter between those two parties. The Platform is not a party to any such dispute and shall not be joined or held liable in any complaint, legal notice, police report, or court case arising from such a dispute. Users agree to indemnify and hold the Platform harmless against any cost, claim, or liability arising from their own conduct or disputes with the other party.

4. Maid/Helper's Specific Responsibilities

As a Maid/Helper, I agree that I am solely responsible for: (a) independently verifying the Customer and the work premises before accepting any engagement; (b) agreeing on wages, working hours, duties, and conduct directly with the Customer before starting work; (c) my own honesty, behaviour, and conduct at the Customer's premises, including with respect to money, property, and valuables; (d) ensuring that all information I have submitted on this Platform, including identity documents, photographs, and personal details, is true, complete, and accurate; (e) immediately reporting any non-payment, harassment, criminal act, or unsafe situation directly to the local police or appropriate authority, since the Platform cannot investigate or resolve such matters on my behalf; and (f) not holding the Platform liable for any loss, injury, dispute, non-payment, or harm arising from my engagement with any Customer.

5. Accuracy of Information and False Documents

I confirm that all information, photographs, and documents I have submitted on this Platform are genuine, accurate, and belong to me. I understand that submitting false, forged, or misleading information or documents is a violation of these Terms and may constitute an offence under applicable Indian law, including the Information Technology Act, 2000, and the Indian Penal Code / Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita. The Platform reserves the right to terminate my account immediately and report such conduct to law enforcement authorities.

6. Health and Safety at Work

I confirm that I am physically and mentally fit to perform the domestic work I have registered for. I acknowledge that neither the Platform nor the Customer is responsible for any injury, illness, or accident I sustain at the work premises, and that I am solely responsible for taking necessary precautions for my own health and safety while at work. I agree that the Platform makes no representation regarding the safety of any Customer's home or premises.

7. Use of Personal Data

7.1 By registering, I consent to the Platform collecting, storing, and processing the information I submit, including name, contact number, address, photograph, and Aadhar details, for the purpose of operating the Platform, identity verification, and enabling connections between Customers and Maids/Helpers.

7.2 I consent that the Platform may use my submitted name, photograph, and profile details for its marketing and promotional purposes unless I have explicitly opted out in writing to the Platform's support team.

7.3 The Platform will take reasonable measures to keep my Aadhar number and ID documents confidential and will not publicly display them. However, I acknowledge that no online platform can guarantee complete data security, and the Platform is not liable for data breaches caused by circumstances beyond its reasonable control.

7.4 The Platform may share my contact number with Customers strictly for the purpose of enabling us to connect and discuss work, as this is the core function of the Platform.

8. No Employer-Employee Relationship

Nothing in these Terms creates an employer-employee relationship, agency relationship, partnership, or joint venture between the Platform and me. The Platform is not responsible for minimum wages, provident fund, ESI, labour law compliance, or any other employment-related obligation. I acknowledge that I am an independent individual and that compliance with any applicable law is my own responsibility.

9. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, the Platform's total liability to me for any claim arising out of or relating to the use of the Platform shall not exceed ₹0 (zero rupees), as the Platform is a free service for Maids/Helpers. The Platform shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential loss arising from any interaction, engagement, or dispute with a Customer.

10. Indemnity

I agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless the Platform, its owners, directors, employees, and representatives from and against any claim, demand, loss, damage, liability, cost, or expense (including legal fees) arising from: my own acts or omissions; any dispute between me and a Customer; any breach of these Terms by me; or any false information or document submitted by me. This indemnity survives termination of my account.

11. Suspension and Termination

The Platform reserves the right to suspend or terminate my account, with or without prior notice, if I am found to have engaged in fraud, criminal activity, harassment, submission of false documents, or any conduct the Platform reasonably believes is harmful to Customers, other Users, or the Platform's reputation. The Platform may share relevant information with law enforcement where required by law or in the public interest.

12. Governing Law and Jurisdiction

These Terms shall be governed by the laws of India. Any dispute arising out of or relating to the use of the Platform itself shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts at the Platform's registered place of business.

13. Changes to These Terms

The Platform may update these Terms from time to time. My continued use of the Platform after any such change constitutes my acceptance of the revised Terms. I am encouraged to review this page periodically.

14. Acknowledgement

By ticking the checkbox below, I confirm that I have read and understood these Terms in full, that I accept sole responsibility for my own conduct and decisions on this Platform, and that I release the Platform from liability for the acts, omissions, and conduct of Customers or other Users as described above.

Complete Maid & Domestic Help Services Across India

From part-time maids to live-in maids, cooks, babysitters, cleaning staff, kitchen helpers, elderly care & more — all verified, background-checked and available near you.

Maid / Cleaning Service

Hire verified cleaning maids for daily sweeping, mopping, dusting, jhadu-pocha and full house cleaning. Our safai wali bai are trained, background-checked and available for part-time (2-4 hrs/day) and full-time (8 hrs/day). House cleaning service starting ₹3,000/month. Deep cleaning maid also available. Book a cleaning maid near me today.

Cook Maid / Kitchen Helper

Find a trusted cook maid near me for breakfast, lunch and dinner cooking. Our kitchen helpers are expert in North Indian, South Indian, and regional cuisines. Hire a personal cook at home, tiffin cook, or kitchen maid for daily cooking. Kitchen cleaning service and kitchen helper available starting ₹5,000/month.

Babysitter / Nanny / Child Care

Book a verified babysitter near me or nanny service India for your child aged 0-12 years. Our child care helpers assist with school pickup, homework, feeding and play. Infant care maid and newborn care maid also available. Trusted japa maid and japa seva for new mothers and babies. Starting ₹8,000/month.

Elderly Care / Patient Care

Hire a trained elderly care attendant or patient care attendant India for senior citizen care at home. Our old age care helpers assist with medication, mobility, companionship and doctor visits. Home nurse India and nursing attendant available for post-surgery recovery and bedridden patient care. Starting ₹10,000/month.

Part-Time Maid Service

Need a part-time maid near me? Our part time maid service is perfect for working families. Maid visits 2-4 hours daily for cleaning, cooking and household chores. Kaam wali bai available in mornings or evenings as per your schedule. Best affordable maid service for apartments, flats and independent houses. Starting just ₹3,000/month.

Full-Time / Live-In Maid

Hire a full-time maid who works 8-12 hours daily for cooking, cleaning, childcare and all household duties. Our live-in maid stays at your home permanently and manages everything. All our live in domestic helpers are Aadhaar-verified, reference-checked and trustworthy. Full-time maid from ₹8,000/month and live-in maid from ₹10,000/month.

Why Rent a Maid India is India's #1 Maid Service Platform

100% Verified & Background-Checked Maids

All maids on our platform are Aadhaar-verified, address-verified and reference-checked. We ensure every domestic helper is safe and trustworthy for your home and family.

Available in 500+ Cities & Towns Across India

From metros to tier-2 and tier-3 cities — Delhi, Mumbai, Bangalore, Kota, Jaipur, Lucknow, Bhopal, Patna and hundreds more. Find maid near you anywhere in India.

Affordable Maid Service Starting ₹3,000/month

India's most affordable domestic help platform. Part-time maid from ₹3,000, cook maid from ₹5,000, full-time maid from ₹8,000 and live-in maid from ₹10,000 per month.

Book a Maid Online in Minutes

Simple online booking process — search maid by city and service, view verified profiles, book and confirm. Get a maid at your home within 24-48 hours. No agency fees or hidden charges.

4.8★ Rating — 50,000+ Happy Families

Over 50,000 families across India trust Rent a Maid India for their domestic help needs. Read genuine reviews from Delhi, Mumbai, Bangalore, Kota and all major cities.

24/7 Customer Support in Hindi & English

Our customer support team is available in Hindi, English and regional languages. Call or WhatsApp us anytime at +91 9530112346 for any help with maid booking or service.

Frequently Asked Questions — Maid Service India

How do I hire a kitchen maid or cook near me?

To hire a kitchen maid or cook near you, simply visit Rent a Maid India, select "Cook" or "Kitchen Helper" as your service type, enter your city (Delhi, Mumbai, Kota, Jaipur, Bangalore etc.), and browse verified cook profiles. Our platform has 10,000+ registered cooks and kitchen maids across India available for part-time, full-time or live-in cooking duties. You can book a personal cook at home starting ₹5,000/month.

What is the cost of hiring a cleaning maid in India?

The cost of hiring a cleaning maid (safai wali bai) in India depends on the city and working hours. A part-time cleaning maid (2-4 hours/day) costs ₹3,000–₹6,000 per month. A full-time cleaning maid (8 hours/day) costs ₹7,000–₹12,000/month. In metros like Delhi and Mumbai, rates are slightly higher. On Rent a Maid India, you get transparent pricing with no hidden charges. Deep cleaning service is also available at daily rates.

How to find a babysitter or nanny near me in India?

Finding a trusted babysitter or nanny near you is easy with Rent a Maid India. Search for "babysitter" or "nanny" in your city on our platform, view verified nanny profiles with ratings and reviews, and book a child care helper for your baby or toddler. All our babysitters are verified and experienced in childcare. A babysitter costs ₹8,000–₹15,000/month depending on the city and duties. Newborn care maid and japa maid also available.

Is maid service available in small cities and towns in India?

Yes! Rent a Maid India provides maid service in 500+ cities and towns across India, not just metros. You can find a maid in Kota, maid in Jodhpur, maid in Ajmer, maid in Dehradun, maid in Raipur, maid in Ranchi, maid in Bhubaneswar, domestic help in Indore, cook maid in Bhopal and many more tier-2 and tier-3 cities. Our platform connects you with verified local maids in your exact area.

How to get a maid for elderly care or patient care at home?

To hire an elderly care attendant or patient care attendant for home, search for "Elder Care" or "Patient Care" on Rent a Maid India. Our trained attendants help senior citizens with daily medication, mobility, doctor visits, meals and companionship. We also have home nurses for post-surgery recovery and bedridden patients. Old age care helper costs ₹10,000–₹20,000/month. Available across India in Delhi, Mumbai, Bangalore, Chennai, Hyderabad, Kota, Jaipur and all major cities.

What documents are required to hire a maid from Rent a Maid India?

Hiring a maid from Rent a Maid India is simple. As a customer, you just need to create a free account and choose a subscription plan. Our platform displays verified maid profiles where we have already checked Aadhaar identity, address and references. You can independently do police verification of your hired maid. We recommend customers do their own police verification of domestic helpers for complete safety. Our verified maid badge means Aadhaar has been submitted and checked by our team.

Terms & Conditions

Last Updated: 26 June 2026

These Terms and Conditions ("Terms") form a legally binding agreement between you ("User," "Customer," "Maid," "Helper," or "you") and Rent a Maid India ("Platform," "we," "us," "our") when you register on, access, or use this website and its services (the "Platform"). By ticking the checkbox and creating an account, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms in full. If you do not agree, you must not register or use the Platform.

1. Nature of the Platform — Connector Only

Rent a Maid India is strictly a listing, advertising, and connection platform. We help Customers and Maids/Helpers discover each other's profiles and share contact numbers after a Customer subscribes to a paid plan. We are NOT an employer, recruitment agency, staffing agency, labour contractor, or placement service. We do not employ, supervise, manage, train, schedule, or control any Maid/Helper, and we are not a party to any employment, service, or work arrangement that a Customer and a Maid/Helper enter into with each other. All hiring decisions, work terms, salary, schedule, conduct, and outcomes are decided entirely and exclusively between the Customer and the Maid/Helper themselves.

2. Verification — What We Do and What We Do NOT Do

2.1 Our verification process for both Customers and Maids/Helpers is limited to checking the profile photograph against the photograph and details on the government-issued Aadhar card submitted at the time of registration. This is an identity check only.

2.2 We do NOT conduct police verification, criminal background checks, character checks, credit checks, medical checks, psychological screening, or any background investigation of any kind on any Customer or Maid/Helper, regardless of any badge, label, or statement displayed on the Platform such as "Verified."

2.3 We make no representation, warranty, or guarantee — express or implied — regarding the character, trustworthiness, honesty, criminal history, health, conduct, competence, skill, or suitability of any Maid/Helper or any Customer. A "Verified" badge confirms only that an Aadhar-linked identity document was submitted and visually matched; it is not a certificate of good character or safety.

2.4 It is the sole and complete responsibility of the Customer to independently verify the identity, antecedents, background, and suitability of any Maid/Helper before engaging them, including obtaining police verification at their own cost, checking references, and conducting in-person interviews. It is equally the sole responsibility of the Maid/Helper to independently verify the identity and bona fides of any Customer before agreeing to work for them. The Platform strongly recommends both parties complete independent verification before any engagement, money exchange, or entry into each other's premises, but proceeding without such verification is a voluntary decision made by the User at their own risk.

3. No Liability for Conduct of Users

3.1 The Platform shall not be held responsible or liable, in any manner whatsoever, for any act, omission, conduct, behaviour, dispute, dishonesty, negligence, criminal act, or default committed by any Customer or Maid/Helper, whether during the verification process, the introduction process, or at any time during or after the work engagement.

3.2 Without limiting the foregoing, the Platform bears no responsibility or liability for: theft, loss, or damage of money, property, valuables, or belongings; non-payment, underpayment, or delayed payment of wages or dues by either party; physical, verbal, sexual, or any other form of harassment, abuse, assault, or misconduct; breach of trust, fraud, cheating, or misrepresentation by either party; any injury, accident, illness, or death occurring at the place of work; any civil or criminal dispute, including police complaints, FIRs, or court proceedings, arising between a Customer and a Maid/Helper; and any loss arising from a Maid/Helper's skill, conduct, reliability, attendance, or quality of work, or from a Customer's conduct, payment practices, or treatment of the Maid/Helper.

3.3 Any dispute, claim, loss, or grievance arising between a Customer and a Maid/Helper is strictly a private matter between those two parties. The Platform is not a necessary or proper party to any such dispute and shall not be joined, named, or held liable in any complaint, legal notice, police report, or court case arising from such a dispute. Users agree not to involve the Platform, its owners, or its staff in any such proceeding, and agree to indemnify and hold the Platform harmless against any cost, claim, or liability arising from their own conduct or disputes with the other party.

4. Responsibility of the Customer

The Customer agrees that they are solely responsible for: independently verifying the Maid/Helper before hiring, including ID, references, and police verification if desired; deciding the terms of work, payment, and conduct directly with the Maid/Helper; the safety, supervision, and conduct of the Maid/Helper while on the Customer's premises; making timely and full payment of any wages or dues agreed with the Maid/Helper; and reporting any criminal act directly to the local police, since the Platform is not equipped or authorised to investigate or resolve such matters.

5. Responsibility of the Maid/Helper

The Maid/Helper agrees that they are solely responsible for: independently verifying the Customer and the work premises before accepting any engagement; agreeing on wages, working hours, and conduct directly with the Customer before starting work; their own conduct, honesty, and behaviour while working at a Customer's premises, including with respect to money, property, and valuables of the Customer or household members; and reporting any criminal act, non-payment, or harassment directly to the local police or appropriate authority, since the Platform cannot investigate or resolve such matters.

6. Payments and Subscriptions

6.1 Customers pay a subscription fee to the Platform solely to unlock contact details of Maids/Helpers and to send connection requests. This subscription fee is consideration for the introduction/connection service only and does not constitute payment of wages, salary, advance, security deposit, or any payment owed to a Maid/Helper.

6.2 Any wages, salary, advance, deposit, or other amount payable to a Maid/Helper must be paid directly by the Customer to the Maid/Helper and is strictly a private arrangement between them. The Platform does not collect, hold, process, or guarantee any such payment and bears no liability for non-payment, short payment, or disputes relating to such payments.

6.3 Subscription fees paid to the Platform are for the connection service rendered (sharing of contact details) and, except as may be required by law, are non-refundable once contact details have been shared, regardless of whether the Customer and Maid/Helper subsequently reach or fail to reach an agreement.

7. Use of Personal Data and Information

7.1 By registering, Customers and Maids/Helpers consent to the Platform collecting, storing, and processing the information they submit, including name, contact number, address, photograph, and Aadhar details, for the purpose of operating the Platform, verification, and enabling connections between Customers and Maids/Helpers.

7.2 Users further consent that the Platform may use their submitted name, photograph, profile details, testimonials, and reviews (excluding Aadhar number and full Aadhar images) for the Platform's own marketing, promotional, and advertising purposes, including on the website, social media, and other promotional material, unless the User has separately and explicitly opted out in writing by contacting the Platform's support team.

7.3 The Platform will take reasonable measures to keep Aadhar numbers and uploaded ID documents confidential and will not publicly display full Aadhar numbers or document images on any public-facing page. However, Users acknowledge that no online platform can guarantee complete security of data, and the Platform is not liable for data breaches caused by circumstances beyond its reasonable control.

7.4 The Platform may share a User's contact number with the other party (Customer or Maid/Helper) strictly for the purpose of enabling them to connect and discuss work, as this is the core function of the Platform.

8. Account Responsibility

Users are responsible for the accuracy of the information they submit at registration and agree not to submit false identity documents, false photographs, or impersonate another person. Any User found submitting false information or impersonating another person may have their account suspended or terminated without refund, and may be reported to the appropriate authorities.

9. No Employer-Employee Relationship

Nothing in these Terms, and nothing on the Platform, creates an employer-employee relationship, agency relationship, partnership, or joint venture between the Platform and any Customer or Maid/Helper, or between a Customer and a Maid/Helper by virtue of using the Platform. The Platform is not responsible for statutory dues, labour law compliance, minimum wage compliance, provident fund, ESI, or any other employment-related obligation that may apply to the working arrangement between a Customer and a Maid/Helper; compliance with any such applicable law is the responsibility of the Customer and/or Maid/Helper as may be required by law.

10. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, the Platform's total liability to any User for any claim arising out of or relating to the use of the Platform shall not exceed the subscription fee actually paid by that User to the Platform in the three (3) months preceding the claim. The Platform shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential loss, including loss of money, property, business, or reputation, arising from any interaction, engagement, or dispute between a Customer and a Maid/Helper.

11. Indemnity

Each User agrees to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless the Platform, its owners, directors, employees, and representatives from and against any claim, demand, loss, damage, liability, cost, or expense (including legal fees) arising from: the User's own acts or omissions; any dispute between the User and another User; any breach of these Terms by the User; or any false information submitted by the User. This indemnity survives termination of the User's account.

12. Suspension and Termination

The Platform reserves the right to suspend or terminate any account, with or without notice, if a User is found to have engaged in fraud, criminal activity, harassment, submission of false documents, or any conduct that the Platform reasonably believes is harmful to other Users or to the Platform's reputation, and may share relevant information with law enforcement where required.

13. Grievances and Disputes

Any disputes between a Customer and a Maid/Helper must be resolved directly between them, including, if necessary, by approaching the local police station or appropriate court having jurisdiction. The Platform may, at its sole discretion and purely as a courtesy, assist by sharing information it holds if legally required to do so by a court or police authority, but undertakes no obligation to mediate, investigate, or resolve disputes between Users.

14. Governing Law and Jurisdiction

These Terms shall be governed by the laws of India. Any dispute arising out of or relating to the use of the Platform itself (as opposed to disputes between Users) shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts at the Platform's registered place of business.

15. Changes to These Terms

The Platform may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of the Platform after such changes constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms. Users are encouraged to review this page periodically.

16. Acknowledgement

By ticking the checkbox at registration, you confirm that you have read and understood these Terms in full, that you accept sole responsibility for your own conduct and decisions on this Platform, and that you release the Platform from liability for the acts, omissions, and conduct of other Users as described above.

Hero Banner

The big section at the top of your homepage

Background Media

Use an image URL, or upload a photo. For video, paste a direct video URL (.mp4) — it will play muted & looped behind the hero text.

Background Overlay (Dark Layer Over Photo)

Background photo ke upar dark color layer — jitna zyada opacity, utna zyada photo chhupega aur text saaf dikhega.

Website Logo

This replaces the orange "R" icon shown next to "Rent a Maid" in the navbar across the whole site. Square images work best (e.g. 80×80px or larger, PNG with transparent background).

Rent a Maid India - India Number 1 Maid Service Platform | Hire Verified Maid Near You

Rent a Maid India is India's most trusted, largest and fastest-growing online platform to rent a maid, hire domestic help, find housekeeping staff, and book verified home helpers in every city, town and village across India. We connect families with background-verified, Aadhaar-checked, reference-verified maids, cooks, babysitters, nannies, elder care attendants, patient care attendants, drivers, home tutors, nurses and housekeeping staff. Whether you search for "maid near me", "rent a maid", "maid rent", "hire maid India", "domestic help near me" or "kaam wali bai near me" — Rent a Maid India is your answer.

All Maid and Domestic Help Services Available Across India

1. Full-Time Maid Service India

Hire a full-time maid in India for 8 to 12 hours daily. Our full-time maids handle cooking, cleaning, sweeping, mopping, utensil washing, laundry, ironing, grocery management, child care and elder assistance. Full-time maid available in Delhi, Mumbai, Bangalore, Chennai, Hyderabad, Pune, Kolkata, Jaipur, Kota, Lucknow, Ahmedabad and 500 plus cities across India. Cost of full-time maid in India: Rs 8000 to Rs 15000 per month. Search keywords: full time maid, full time maid near me, full time maid India, hire full time maid, full time domestic help, full time bai, poora din ki bai, subah shaam ki bai, 8 ghante wali bai.

2. Part-Time Maid Service India

Hire a part-time maid in India for 2 to 4 hours daily. Part-time maids visit your home every morning or evening for cooking, cleaning and household chores. A part-time maid can work in multiple homes. Part-time maid available in all cities of India starting from Rs 3000 per month. Search keywords: part time maid, part time maid near me, thodi der ki bai, 2 ghante ki bai, part time domestic help, morning maid, evening maid, part time kaam wali bai, flexible maid service India.

3. Live-In Maid India

Hire a live-in maid in India who stays permanently at your home. Live-in maids are available 24 hours, 7 days a week for all household duties including cooking, cleaning, childcare and elder care. Live-in maid service available across India starting from Rs 10000 per month. Search keywords: live in maid India, live in domestic help, resident maid, ghar mein rehne wali bai, stay in maid India, permanent maid India, 24 hour maid India, round the clock maid.

4. Cook / Bai Service India

Hire a dedicated cook maid in India for breakfast, lunch and dinner. Our cook maids are experts in North Indian, South Indian, Bengali, Gujarati, Maharashtrian, Rajasthani and all regional Indian cuisines. Cook maid also handles grocery shopping, meal planning and hygienic kitchen management. Cook maid available in all cities of India starting from Rs 5000 per month. Search keywords: cook maid, cook bai, khana banane wali bai, cook near me, hire cook India, Indian cook maid, khana pakane wali, cook at home India, home cook India, tiffin cook India, breakfast cook, dinner cook, Indian cuisine cook, regional cook maid, cook maid Delhi, cook maid Mumbai, cook maid Bangalore.

5. Babysitter and Nanny Service India

Hire a trusted babysitter or nanny in India for infant care, toddler care and child care up to 12 years old. Our babysitters and nannies handle feeding, bathing, school pickup and drop, homework help, playtime and first aid. Babysitter and nanny available across India starting from Rs 8000 per month. Search keywords: babysitter India, nanny India, babysitter near me, nanny near me, child care India, hire babysitter India, baby dekhne wali, bacha dekhne wali, nanny for infant India, nanny for toddler India, school pickup drop maid, homework help maid, babysitter Delhi, babysitter Mumbai, babysitter Bangalore, babysitter Hyderabad, babysitter Kota, babysitter Jaipur.

6. Elder Care Attendant India

Hire a trained elder care attendant in India for senior citizen care at home. Our elder care attendants provide medication reminders, mobility assistance, bathing and grooming help, companionship, doctor visit support and physiotherapy assistance. Elder care available across India starting from Rs 10000 per month. Search keywords: elder care India, senior citizen care India, old age care at home India, elderly care attendant, buzdurg ki seva, buzdurg dekhbhal, old age home helper, elder care maid, senior care attendant India, elderly companion India, elder care Delhi, elder care Mumbai, elder care Bangalore.

7. Patient Care Attendant India

Hire a trained patient care attendant in India for post-surgery recovery, bedridden patient care and hospital support. Our patient care attendants monitor vitals, assist with medicines, handle catheter and wound care, provide bathing support and coordinate with doctors. Patient care attendant available across India starting from Rs 12000 per month. Search keywords: patient care attendant India, patient attendant near me, bedridden patient care India, hospital attendant India, post surgery care at home India, home nursing India, bimar ki seva, marz ki dekhbhal, home patient care, patient care maid, patient attendant Delhi, patient attendant Mumbai.

8. Nurse and Medical Attendant India

Hire qualified registered nurses and medical attendants in India for home nursing care. Our nurses handle injections, wound dressing, IV fluids, vital monitoring, medication management and doctor-coordinated care at home. Home nurse available across India starting from Rs 15000 per month. Search keywords: home nurse India, nurse near me India, home nursing service India, registered nurse at home India, qualified nurse India, nurse for home India, ghar pe nurse, nurse for bedridden patient India, medical attendant India, nursing at home India, home nurse Delhi, home nurse Mumbai, home nurse Bangalore, home nurse Hyderabad.

9. Newborn and Infant Care / Japa Maid India

Hire a trained newborn care maid or japa maid in India for post-delivery mother and baby care. Our newborn care specialists handle infant bathing, feeding support, breastfeeding guidance, baby massage, diaper changing and new mother recovery care. Newborn care maid and japa maid available across India starting from Rs 10000 per month. Search keywords: newborn care India, japa maid India, japa bai India, infant care maid India, baby care maid India, neonatal care at home India, post delivery care India, maternity care maid India, new mother care India, delivery ke baad ki bai, japa maid Delhi, japa maid Mumbai, japa maid Bangalore, japa maid Hyderabad, japa maid Kota, japa maid Jaipur.

10. Cleaning and Safai Service India

Hire a dedicated cleaning maid in India for deep cleaning, daily sweeping, mopping, bathroom cleaning, kitchen cleaning and festive cleaning. Our cleaning maids ensure a spotless, hygienic home every day. Cleaning maid service available across India starting from Rs 3000 per month. Search keywords: cleaning maid India, safai wali India, jhadoo poncha wali, deep cleaning service India, home cleaning India, house cleaning maid near me, kitchen cleaning maid, bathroom cleaning maid, Diwali cleaning maid, festive cleaning India, cleaning service near me India, daily cleaning maid India, safai karne wali bai.

11. Laundry and Ironing Service India

Hire a laundry and ironing maid in India for daily clothes washing, drying, folding and ironing service at home. Laundry maid available across India starting from Rs 2500 per month. Search keywords: laundry maid India, kapde dhone wali bai, istri wali, ironing service at home India, laundry service at home India, clothes washing maid India, daily laundry maid, kapde dhona istri karna, laundry near me India.

12. Driver Service India

Hire a verified driver in India for school drops, office commute, airport transfers, outstation trips and weekend travel. All our drivers have valid driving licenses, are background-checked and vehicle-experienced. Driver on rent available across India starting from Rs 12000 per month. Search keywords: driver on rent India, driver near me India, hire driver India, part time driver India, full time driver India, school driver India, office driver India, personal driver India, driver for home India, monthly driver India, driver rent India, driver salary India, car driver India, chauffeur India, driver Delhi, driver Mumbai, driver Bangalore, driver Hyderabad, driver Kota, driver Jaipur.

13. Home Tutor India

Hire a home tutor in India for all subjects, all grades from Class 1 to Class 12, CBSE, ICSE, State Board, IIT JEE, NEET and competitive exam preparation. Home tutors available across India starting from Rs 4000 per month. Search keywords: home tutor India, home tutor near me, ghar pe tutor India, private tutor India, tutor for class 10 India, tutor for class 12 India, IIT JEE tutor India, NEET tutor India, CBSE tutor India, maths tutor India, science tutor India, English tutor India, home teacher India, private teacher India, tutor Delhi, tutor Mumbai, tutor Bangalore, tutor Jaipur, tutor Kota.

Frequently Asked Questions About Maid Service in India

Maid near me kaise dhundhe?

Rent a Maid India pe apna sheher enter karo aur verified maid near you ki list dekho. Hum 500 plus cities mein maid service provide karte hain. Aap same day maid bhi book kar sakte ho.

Maid ki salary kitni hoti hai India mein?

India mein maid ki salary service type ke hisaab se hoti hai: Part-time maid Rs 3000-7000/month, Full-time maid Rs 8000-15000/month, Cook maid Rs 5000-12000/month, Live-in maid Rs 10000-20000/month, Babysitter/Nanny Rs 8000-15000/month, Elder care Rs 10000-20000/month, Patient care Rs 12000-22000/month, Nurse Rs 15000-28000/month, Driver Rs 12000-20000/month, Home Tutor Rs 4000-10000/month.

Kya maid background verified hoti hai?

Haan, Rent a Maid India pe saari maids 100% verified hain. Hum Aadhaar card verification, police verification, address verification aur previous employer reference check karte hain. Aapke ghar mein sirf bharosemand aur safe maid aayegi.

Kya Rent a Maid India service chhoti cities mein bhi available hai?

Haan! Hum sirf metros mein nahi, balki tier 2 aur tier 3 cities mein bhi service dete hain jaise Kota, Ajmer, Bikaner, Udaipur, Nashik, Aurangabad, Hubli, Mysore, Tiruppur, Siliguri, Durgapur, Raipur, Ranchi, Bhubaneswar, Dehradun aur 500 plus cities.

Replacement policy kya hai?

Agar maid kaam chhod de ya aapko pasand na aaye, toh Rent a Maid India free replacement guarantee deta hai. Aapko extra charge nahi lagega.
